title: Mousehouse Gifts - Soft Plush Blue Elephant Baby Blanket with Teddy Comforter, Soothing Newborn Swaddle for Boys and Girls
features: SUPER SOFT BABY BLANKET: Our charming comfort blanket with a soft toy is designed to soothe and calm young children, babies, and toddlers. This adorable soother is one of our favourite nursery items, perfect for creating lasting memories with your little ones.

PLUSH MATERIAL AND TEDDY DESIGN: Made from premium, luxuriously soft plush material, this blanket features a sweet little teddy attached. The double-sided smooth design ensures ultimate comfort for your child's delicate skin.

MULTIPLE ADORABLE VARIANTS: Choose from our range of cute animal designs, including Blue Bunny, Pink Bunny, Pink Donkey, Pink Elephant, Blue Elephant, and Grey Elephant. Use it as a comforter, swaddle, or nursery decoration to add a touch of warmth to any room.

SAFE FROM BIRTH AND EASY TO CLEAN: We've ensured this comforter is tested and safe for newborns. It's also machine washable, making it easy to keep clean and fresh for your little one's everyday use and adventures.

MOUSEHOUSE QUALITY: We take pride in creating timeless toys that spark joy and create lasting memories. Our signature designs and attention to detail ensure you're getting a premium product that will be treasured for years to come.
description: Product Description MouseHouse offers you an exclusive collection of wonderful toys and playroom decorations for young children. Popular items include cuddly animals, music boxes, push along toys, bookends, money boxes - and beautiful new baby gifts. UNIQUE DESIGNS A beautiful range of soft toys available only from MouseHouse and designed exclusively for babies and young children. WASHABLE FABRICS Created for Mums and Dads as well as children, our cuddly soft toys are carefully made from surface-washable materials. PREMIUM MATERIALS Each loveable soft toy is made from premium materials to ensure the ultimate in softness, comfort and huggability. EXCLUSIVE PRODUCTS Our exclusive items for children include cuddly soft animals, wooden toys, bookends, money boxes - and new baby gifts. MAKE LEARNING FUN MouseHouse offers playful educational toys and colourful playroom decorations to keep children happy as they learn. TIMELESS GIFTS These unique toys are so adorable and well-made - they'll become treasured gifts to be cherished for years to come.
